an10.40:1.0.1: "‘Saṅghasāmaggī, saṅghasāmaggī’ti, bhante, vuccati. Kittāvatā nu kho, bhante, saṅgho samaggo hotī"ti?
an10.40:1.0.2: "Bhinnaṁ pana, bhante, saṅghaṁ samaggaṁ katvā kiṁ so pasavatī"ti?
an10.40:1.0.3: Sukhā saṅghassa sāmaggī,samaggānañca anuggaho;Samaggarato dhammaṭṭho,yogakkhemā na dhaṁsati;Saṅghaṁ samaggaṁ katvāna,kappaṁ saggamhi modatī"ti.
